project: Fig Tree Residences — Phase 2 Higgsfield Cinema Studio shot list
global_rules: The image is the source of truth. Animation may only reveal it through camera movement.
No shot invents architecture, furniture, decor, or people not present in the source photograph.
Preferred movements only: slow dolly in, slow orbit, crane up, parallax reveal, focus pull.

shots.subject: The residence beneath the fig tree
shots.style: Luxury hospitality marketing — quiet, controlled, no overt drama
shots.grading: Match public/media colour-corrected source; do not re-introduce yellow-green cast
constraints: Do not invent furniture, windows, decor, or room geometry
Do not add or remove people
Do not change wall colour, floor material, or fixed architecture
Camera motion only — the room itself must not appear to move or warp
Reveal the full three-storey teal facade from garden level upward. No new architecture — the building is exactly as tall as this frame shows.
